rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount is unrelated to Elec. Code §277.0021, which merely defines 'qualified voter' as 'registered voter' for petition eligibility.
quote: A reference in a law outside this code to "qualified voter" in the context of eligibility to sign a petition means "registered voter."
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the election-code definition of qualified voter.
